2606.20913.title: PROTON: Prototype-Based Test-Time Online OOD Detection for Medical VLMs
2606.20913.paper_summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) enable zero-shot clinical image classification, yet reliably detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs at deployment remains an open problem. No static scoring method works across all shift types: Maximum Concept Matching (MCM) on FLAIR achieves 76.4% AUROC for far-OOD but only 42.4% for covariate shifts such as ultra-wide-field fundus images, effectively random. We trace this to a structural mismatch: covariate-shifted inputs are indistinguishable from in-distribution samples in softmax space, yet occupy distinct regions in the VLM embedding space. To exploit this untapped signal, we propose PROTON (PROtotype-based Test-time ONline OOD detection), a lightweight post-hoc module that maintains an online prototype bank from high-confidence test predictions and adaptively fuses prototype distance with MCM scoring via stream-level variance statistics, requiring no model modification, training data, or prompt engineering. On the ophthalmology benchmark FLAIR + FIVES, PROTON improves MCM by +23.9 AUROC on covariate shift, +8.8 on semantic shift, and +8.1 on far-OOD, making it the only zero-shot method to improve all three without hierarchical prompts or labeled data. Code is available at https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/PROTON, and the project page is available at https://genmi-lab.github.io/PROTON.
2606.20913.paper_summary_zh: 醫學視覺語言模型（VLMs）使得零樣本臨床影像分類成為可能，但在部署時可靠地檢測分佈外（OOD）輸入仍然是一個未解決的問題。沒有靜態評分方法能夠適用於所有類型的變化：在 FLAIR 上，最大概念匹配（MCM）對於遠 OOD 的 AUROC 達到 76.4%，但對於如超廣角眼底影像等協變變化僅為 42.4%，實際上是隨機的。我們將此追溯到結構不匹配：在 softmax 空間中，協變變化的輸入與分佈內樣本無法區分，但在 VLM 嵌入空間中卻佔據不同的區域。為了利用這一未開發的信號，我們提出了 PROTON（基於原型的測試時在線 OOD 檢測），這是一個輕量級的事後模塊，從高信心的測試預測中維護在線原型庫，並通過流級變異統計自適應地融合原型距離與 MCM 評分，無需模型修改、訓練數據或提示工程。在眼科基準 FLAIR + FIVES 上，PROTON 在協變變化上將 MCM 提升了 +23.9 AUROC，在語義變化上提升了 +8.8，在遠 OOD 上提升了 +8.1，使其成為唯一能在不使用層次提示或標記數據的情況下改善所有三者的零樣本方法。代碼可在 https://github.com/GenMI-Lab/PROTON 獲得，項目頁面可在 https://genmi-lab.github.io/PROTON 獲得。
2606.20913.author: Abhijit Das et.al.
2606.20913.authors: Abhijit Das, Nichula Wasalathilaka, Yifan Lu, Adinath Dukre, Dwarikanath Mahapatra, Shadab Khan, Imran Razzak
